estimatorCTA.title: Want to estimate how much your project will cost?
estimatorCTA.description: Get an instant cost estimate in just a few steps. Select your project type, features, and preferences – we'll give you a ballpark figure.

estimator.title: Project Estimator
estimator.headline: What will it cost to build?
estimator.subtitle: Answer a few questions — get an honest price range at real Tashkent market rates, refined by AI. No email required.
estimator.typeHint: Pick the closest match — you can refine everything later.

serviceDesc.mobile: iOS & Android, App Store + Google Play
serviceDesc.web: From landing pages to SaaS platforms
serviceDesc.telegram: Bots, Mini Apps, payments inside Telegram

estimator.platformHint: Both platforms from one cross-platform codebase is the regional default.

approachDesc.cross: One codebase for both platforms — faster and cheaper, native-like quality
approachDesc.native: A separate codebase per platform — maximum performance

estimator.tierHint: This scales QA depth, edge cases and polish.

tierDesc.mvp: Launch fast, validate the idea, core features only
tierDesc.standard: A solid product: thorough QA, edge cases, polish

estimator.screensHint: Count each unique view: login, catalog, cart, profile…
estimator.screensIncluded: {count} screens are already included in the base price
estimator.featuresHint: Prices show the approximate add-on cost. Popular picks for your project type are pre-selected — feel free to untick.
estimator.integrationsHint: Payment systems, SMS, maps and business tools of the Central Asia market — we integrate them all.
estimator.techHint: Optional — pick technologies you prefer, or trust our recommendation. The choice doesn't change the price, except native mobile.
estimator.autoTechDesc: We'll pick the optimal stack for your budget and scale

designDesc.ready: Figma or similar — we build exactly to them (−8%)
designDesc.template: Proven UI patterns adapted to your brand

estimator.languagesHint: Uzbek + Russian is the market standard; add English for international users.
estimator.descriptionHint: One or two sentences help the AI catch scope that checkboxes miss.
estimator.descriptionPlaceholder: E.g.: a delivery app for our restaurant chain in Tashkent with courier tracking and Payme payments…
estimator.indicativeNote: Indicative range at Tashkent market rates. Final quote after a free scoping call.
estimator.resultSub: Built from real Central Asia market rates — not inflated placeholders.
estimator.aiLoading: Our AI is reviewing your scope — usually 20–40 seconds…
estimator.breakdownMultiplier: Scope multiplier (level, design, languages, platforms, urgency)
estimator.breakdownNote: Hours are estimated ranges, not a contract. Integrations are added at fixed effort and are not scaled by the multiplier. The exact quote comes from a short scoping call — usually it lands inside the range above.
estimator.leadSub: We'll review your configuration and reply with a personal quote — usually within one business day.
estimator.leadPrivacy: No spam — one reply from a real developer.
estimator.leadSuccessSub: We got your configuration and will reach out shortly. You can also ping us on Telegram right away.
estimator.leadErrorPhone: Please enter a valid phone number
estimator.leadErrorSubmit: Couldn't send — please try again or write to us on Telegram

faq.title: Website creation stages:
faq.description:
A website created by Softwhere is an effective business tool that works 24/7, and we guarantee its proper development and promotion.
It attracts customers to you, increases sales and increases user loyalty.
faq.answer1: In the first stage, you define the goals of your website, content, addresses and prepare the right data. Planning includes making decisions about the structure, design and functions of your site.
faq.answer2: In the second stage, you create the design of your site based on the pre-prepared plan. Here you can develop your brand design, colors, fonts and interface design based on your brand concepts.
faq.answer3: At this stage, code writing begins based on design and functions. Here you will need front-end (client side) and back-end (server logic and data handling) programming.
faq.answer4: In the final stage, the created site is tested and prepared for placement on the Internet. At this stage, it is necessary to conduct all types of tests to detect problems and errors, fix them and present your site to a wide audience.

aiSpotlight.title: We turn your documents into a product that answers questions, drafts work, and takes action.

process.title: Four stages, zero surprises.
process.step1Desc: We define goals, scope and structure, and prepare the right data to build on.
process.step2Desc: Brand, colors, type and interface — a design your users understand instantly.
process.step3Desc: Front-end and back-end engineered together, shipped in reviewable increments.
process.step4Desc: Full testing, then a smooth launch — with a year of free hosting for early clients.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: How SoftWhere.uz handles the data you share: what we collect through the contact and estimator forms, where it is stored, and how to reach us about it.
privacy.intro: SoftWhere.uz ("we") is a software development studio in Tashkent, Uzbekistan. This page explains what data our website collects, why, and what happens to it. We collect the minimum needed to reply to your enquiry — nothing more.
privacy.collectBody: The site stores personal data only when you submit a form. The contact form collects your name, phone number, and an optional message. The project estimator's request form collects your name, phone number, an optional comment, your preferred contact method, and the project configuration you assembled (project type, features, the free-text project description you typed, and the price estimate). We do not collect email addresses and we do not store your IP address (it is used transiently for rate limiting only). Browsing the site requires no account.
privacy.useBody: Form submissions are used for one purpose: replying to your enquiry. Each submission is also forwarded as a notification to our team's Telegram chat, so Telegram is a recipient of the data you submit. We do not run marketing mailings and we do not sell or share your data with advertisers.
privacy.storeBody: Submissions are stored in our database hosted on Neon (serverless Postgres), and the site runs on Vercel's hosting platform. Both act as infrastructure processors for the data above.
privacy.analyticsBody: We use Vercel Analytics and Vercel Speed Insights — cookieless, aggregate product analytics served from our own domain. There are no advertising trackers, no Google Analytics, no Yandex Metrica, and no cross-site tracking on this site.
privacy.cookiesBody: The only cookie set for visitors is NEXT_LOCALE, a functional cookie that remembers your language choice. Admin session cookies exist only for site administrators. Your theme preference and currency choice are kept in your browser's local storage, and the estimator draft in session storage (cleared when you close the tab) — none of it ever leaves your device.
privacy.aiBody: To produce a price estimate, the project configuration — including the free-text project description you type — is processed by our AI providers (Moonshot AI and DeepSeek). Your name and phone number are never sent to them. Please do not put personal data into the project description field.
privacy.rightsBody: You can ask us at any time what data we hold about you, or ask us to delete it. Write to kamuranbek98@gmail.com or call +998 33 249-91-11 and we will handle it promptly.
privacy.changesBody: If our data practices change, we will update this page and the date above.

webDevelopment.metaTitle: Web Development in Tashkent — Landing to SaaS | Softwhere
webDevelopment.metaDescription: Full-cycle web development in Tashkent: landing pages from $300, corporate websites, e-commerce stores, SaaS and CRM systems. Three languages, SEO-ready, a year of free hosting for early clients.
webDevelopment.h1: Website & Web App Development in Tashkent
webDevelopment.intro: We design, build, and launch websites that sell — from a one-week landing page to a full e-commerce store or SaaS platform. Modern stack (Next.js, React), fast loading, SEO-ready structure, and Uzbek/Russian/English support out of the box.
webDevelopment.offer1Desc: A selling page for ads and fast launches — design, copy, and analytics included.
webDevelopment.offer2Desc: A company site with a service catalog, blog, and request forms that is easy to manage.
webDevelopment.offer3Desc: Catalog, cart, Payme/Click/Uzum online payments, and delivery integration.
webDevelopment.offer4Desc: User accounts, subscriptions, dashboards — an architecture that is ready to grow.
webDevelopment.offer5Desc: Internal systems shaped to your processes: leads, inventory, reports, staff roles.
webDevelopment.why1: Fixed timeline and budget agreed before we start — no surprises mid-project.
webDevelopment.why2: SEO and speed by default: server-side rendering and Core Web Vitals optimization.
webDevelopment.why3: Three languages (uz/ru/en) and local payment systems — Uzbekistan specifics covered.
webDevelopment.why4: A year of free hosting for early clients, plus support after launch.

mobileApps.metaTitle: Mobile App Development in Tashkent — iOS & Android | Softwhere
mobileApps.metaDescription: iOS and Android app development in Tashkent: e-commerce, delivery, booking, fintech. An MVP in 90 days from $3,000. React Native and Flutter.
mobileApps.intro: We build cross-platform apps for iOS and Android with React Native and Flutter: one codebase, native feel, published to the App Store and Google Play. From a 90-day MVP to a full product with backend and analytics.
mobileApps.offer1Desc: Catalog, cart, Payme/Click payments, order tracking, and push notifications.
mobileApps.offer2Desc: Appointments, schedules, reminders — for clinics, salons, and service businesses.
mobileApps.offer3Desc: Wallets, payments, and KYC flows with data security as the first requirement.
mobileApps.offer4Desc: Internal tools for your team: sales, inventory, and reporting on the go.
mobileApps.offer5Desc: Validate the idea in 90 days: core features, real users, real metrics.
mobileApps.why1: One team ships the app, the backend, and the admin panel end to end.
mobileApps.why2: Cross-platform: iOS and Android from one codebase, cheaper to maintain.
mobileApps.why3: Store publishing and analytics setup are part of the job, not extras.
mobileApps.why4: Support and iteration after launch — with no forced lock-in to us.

telegramBots.metaTitle: Telegram Bot & Mini App Development in Tashkent | Softwhere
telegramBots.metaDescription: Telegram bots for business in Uzbekistan: order taking, Payme/Click payments, customer support, Mini Apps. From $250, launched in 1–2 weeks.
telegramBots.intro: Telegram is the main customer channel in Uzbekistan. We build bots that take orders, answer customers, and accept payment right in the chat — plus full Mini Apps, applications that run inside Telegram with nothing to install.
telegramBots.offer1Desc: Catalog, FAQ, requests, and broadcasts — the fastest way into Telegram.
telegramBots.offer2Desc: Checkout in the chat with manager notifications and order statuses for the client.
telegramBots.offer3Desc: Payme, Click, and Telegram Payments: customers pay without leaving the chat.
telegramBots.offer4Desc: Request routing, instant answers to common questions, hand-off to an operator.
telegramBots.offer5Desc: A full application inside Telegram: store, booking, loyalty program.
telegramBots.why1: We know the local payment stack: Payme, Click, Uzum, and fiscalization (OFD).
telegramBots.why2: A simple bot launches in 1–2 weeks; Mini Apps from one month.
telegramBots.why3: Bots integrate with your CRM, inventory, and website.
telegramBots.why4: Hosting, monitoring, and support of the bot after launch.
